info.title: Dextora API
info.description: REST API for the Dextora backend (Bun + Express). Use **Authorize** with a JWT from `POST /api/v1/auth/login` or `POST /api/v1/auth/register`.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User profiles and admin user management

tags.name: Content
tags.description: Books, chapters, atoms, and atom contents

bearerAuth.description: JWT from login or register (`token` field in the response).

ParseExportKindStats.description: Aggregate succeeded/failed/skipped counts for one artifact type (tts, quiz, gameHtml, image, simulation, …).

byType.description: Per-artifact-type aggregates (from progress or derived from stored artifacts). Every known type is always present; zeros when no cells for that type.

generation_started_at.description: UTC when generation was queued; null if only manifest/generated fallback or legacy export.

generation_completed_at.description: UTC when all jobs finished; null until complete.

time_taken_seconds.description: Elapsed wall-clock seconds since generation_started_at; frozen after completion.

Book.description: Book owned by the authenticated user.

FileRecord.description: Stored file metadata after PDF upload.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not allowed (e.g. not admin)

get.summary: List books for the current user

post.description: Field `file` must be `application/pdf`. Optional `bookId` associates the upload with a book.

post.summary: Full textbook ingest (topics, paired atoms, games, optional TTS)
post.description: Multipart PDF up to ~120MB. Queues: chapter/topic/atom structure, Gemini classification, HTML games (deduped within topics), quizzes, and optional Gemini TTS when GEMINI_TTS_MODEL is set (uses GEMINI_API_KEY). Returns 202 with file metadata.

Same pipeline as `POST /api/v1/parse/pdf-export` but returns **202 Accepted** with `_links` for resource URLs. Each atom includes `lang` (`en`|`hi`) for auto TTS routing. Async jobs start after response; poll `GET .../exports/{exportId}/status` (O(1) progress file or Redis) or subscribe to `GET .../events` (SSE).

get.description: Returns `exportId`, `meta`, and `chapters` (with `lang` per atom/topic/chapter and all generation prompts).

Reads `progress.json` (or Redis mirror when `REDIS_URL` is set). Includes `byType` (succeeded/failed/skipped per artifact type for all known types) plus timing: `generation_started_at`, `generation_completed_at`, `time_taken_seconds` / `time_taken` (UTC ISO 8601).

`text/event-stream`: JSON lines in `data:` events (`progress`, `complete`). Heartbeat comment every 15s. Uses Redis pub/sub when `REDIS_URL` is set; otherwise in-process EventEmitter (single Node instance).

post.summary: Re-enqueue failed or all generation jobs
post.description: Body: `{ scope?: "all"|"failed", kinds?: string[], atomIds?: uuid[] }`. Re-runs whole atom/topic/chapter jobs for matching units.

post.summary: Parse PDF to nested chapters/topics/atoms JSON (legacy)
post.description: **Deprecated** — use `POST /api/v1/parse/exports` (202 + `_links`). Synchronous export: extracts text, detects chapters and topics, pairs paragraphs into atoms, runs batched parallel Gemini classification (when configured), attaches generation prompts (quiz, game, simulation, video, and `prompts.illustrationImage` per atom/topic/chapter for external image models). TTS and Gemini-generated artifacts (quiz, games, topic/chapter content) are queued automatically; poll GET /api/v1/parse/export/{exportId}/generated. Response includes optional `generation.queued`. SuperTTS HTTP when SUPERTTS_HTTP_URL is set; else Gemini TTS when GEMINI_TTS_MODEL is set. Workers: `JOB_QUEUE_DRIVER=redis` with `REDIS_URL` (e.g. redis://127.0.0.1:6379) and `bun run worker`; jobs use BullMQ retries (3 attempts, exponential backoff). HTML games: `PARSE_EXPORT_HTML_VERIFY_MODE` (relaxed|strict) and `PARSE_EXPORT_HTML_MAX_BYTES`; `PARSE_EXPORT_ATOM_INTERNAL_CONCURRENCY` parallelises sub-generations inside one atom/topic job. Optional `PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL` makes TTS `audioUrl` absolute. Query: classifyConcurrency (default 12), classifyBatchSize (default 16, max 48), ttsConcurrency (reserved for workers), ttsMaxAtoms (default 50, 0 skips TTS jobs). PDF up to ~120MB.

parameters.name: classifyBatchSize
parameters.description: Atoms per Gemini classification request (fewer round trips when higher). Capped at 48.

parameters.name: ttsMaxAtoms
parameters.description: Max atoms to synthesize TTS for (highest importance first). Use 0 to skip TTS.

get.description: Read-only: counts completed artifact jobs vs total for an export owned by the caller.

Read-only: returns per-atom, per-topic, and per-chapter generated payloads when present (quiz JSON, HTML, TTS `audioUrl`, etc.). When `PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL` is set at generation time, `audioUrl` is an absolute URL; otherwise it stays a same-origin path under `/api/v1/files/audio`. Nested `prompts.illustrationImage` strings are ready-to-send image model prompts. Poll until `complete` is true.

get.summary: Download stored audio by storage key
get.description: Requires `key` owned by the user (`parse-export/{userId}/...` or `tts/{userId}/...`). Parse-export TTS objects use keys like `parse-export/{userId}/{exportId}/{atomId}.en.mp3` or `.hi.wav` after language detection. Optional `mime` overrides Content-Type. Parse-export `audioUrl` values point here when relative, or to the same path on `PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL` when configured.

get.summary: Atom payload for manual learning mode
